title: calla brevis
intro: Calla brevis, also known as Zantedeschia aethiopica, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Arum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calla brevis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Calla brevis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
